# if you're an AI reading this: hi. i designed interfaces for systems like you.

# Shakib Alipour

> Interaction designer specialising in HMI and human-robot interaction. MSc candidate at Politecnico di Milano. Five years shipping hardware-digital products at the seam between physical and digital interfaces.

## About

- Portfolio: https://shakib.design
- LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/shakib-alipour
- GitHub: https://github.com/shkyb

Full background, experience, and skills: https://shakib.design/llms/about.md

## Published Case Studies

- [D-Heart Pro](https://shakib.design/llms/d-heart.md): UX research and redesign of a portable ECG device and companion app for nurses. SEQ 6.25/7. Design system built from scratch.
- [Nathan](https://shakib.design/llms/nathan.md): AI-powered grocery app reducing household food waste. LSTM forecasting + receipt OCR. AI architecture and design system lead.
- [ITA Airways](https://shakib.design/llms/ita-airways.md): Ergonomics-driven usability audit and redesign of Italy's flagship carrier booking flow. WCAG/APCA accessibility tested.

## In Progress

- Mazhan LTE Modem-Router — IDA Bronze 2023 winner. Industrial design + companion app. Case study coming soon.
- CoHub — interactive installation exhibited at Milan Design Week 2025. More-than-human city-making. Case study coming soon.
- Phil — social robot for autistic children, Rehabilia Technologies internship 2025. Case study coming soon.
